checked_files_notes.rationale: Active generated test listed in tests/generated/20260521-090300/manifest.json with status: active. Modified <7 days (today, 2026-05-24). check-file-references.sh is not authoritative for pytest/manifest-discovered generated tests — index and manifest references are the functional ownership mechanism. Keep while listed under active_tests; revisit only if the generated test suite is formally retired, manifest status changes to archived/inactive, or explicit user-approved cleanup is provided.

Active generated test listed in tests/generated/20260521-090300/manifest.json with status: active. Modified <7 days (today, 2026-05-24). Same rationale as AC1 test: manifest registration is the ownership contract. Keep while listed under active_tests; revisit only if manifest status changes or explicit user-approved cleanup is provided.

No bare .hook-refactor-allow ignore entry present. The test_AC1 assertion (.gitignore must not contain a bare .hook-refactor-allow line) passes against the current content. No cleanliness issue in this diff.

summary.verdict: CLEAN — no cleanliness issues introduced in this diff
summary.notes: All three changed files are clean. The two test files are active per manifest.json and protected by the <7-day Safety Rule. The .gitignore contains no sentinel pattern that would silently hide future .hook-refactor-allow files.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex identified 4 issues in the draft findings: (1) test_AC1 should not be in archive_candidates — false positive; (2) test_AC6 same false positive; (3) 'note for future archival review' wording too loose — should tie archival trigger to manifest status change; (4) .gitignore Finding 4 should not appear as a finding when it has 'no issue'. All 4 were blockers with PROPOSED_FIX. Additionally one OBSERVATION_ONLY item confirmed no Safety Rules violation.

findings.issue: Finding 2 (test_AC1) is a false positive: an active generated pytest file listed in manifest.json should not be categorized as archive_candidates / orphaned_tests merely because check-file-references.sh exits 2.
findings.proposed_fix: Remove Finding 2 from findings. Move to non-blocking checked_files_notes: 'Kept: active generated test listed in manifest with status: active; modified <7 days; check-file-references.sh is not authoritative for manifest-discovered tests.'
findings.rationale: Codex is correct: check-file-references.sh exit code 2 is advisory for pytest-test files whose ownership is declared in manifest.json. Removed from archive_candidates; added to checked_files_notes.

findings.issue: Finding 3 (test_AC6) has the same false-positive categorization as Finding 2.
findings.proposed_fix: Remove Finding 3 from findings. Move to non-blocking checked_files_notes: 'Kept: active generated test listed in manifest with status: active; modified <7 days; do not archive/delete unless manifest status changes to archived/inactive or explicit cleanup approval exists.'
findings.rationale: Same rationale as Finding 2. Removed from archive_candidates; added to checked_files_notes.

findings.issue: The 'note for future archival review' wording in the draft is too loose: once the <7-day rule expires, active manifest status still protects these tests.
findings.proposed_fix: Replace with: 'Keep while listed under active_tests; revisit only if the generated test suite is formally retired, manifest status changes, or explicit user-approved cleanup is provided.'
findings.rationale: Applied the improved wording in checked_files_notes for both test files.

findings.issue: Finding 4 is labeled as a finding despite saying 'no issue'. Also .gitignore is not a document_structure issue.
findings.proposed_fix: Remove Finding 4 from findings and put in summary/checked-files note: 'Checked .gitignore: no bare .hook-refactor-allow entry; no cleanliness issue.'
findings.rationale: Applied: .gitignore status moved to checked_files_notes with disposition 'clean'.

findings.issue: No proposed deletion currently violates Safety Rules, because the draft recommends keeping the two test files.
findings.rationale: Confirms Safety Rules compliance. No action required.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 4 PROPOSED_FIX items applied: test files removed from archive_candidates category and moved to checked_files_notes; .gitignore finding removed from findings and moved to checked_files_notes; archival trigger wording updated to reference manifest status change rather than time-only condition.
